content.json:
# SpyCloud Breach Catalog Dashboard
**Breach Source Intelligence** - Analyze breach sources, categories, and catalog entries from SpyCloud Breach Catalog data.

> This workbook focuses exclusively on SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL data for understanding the breach landscape affecting your organization.

---

parameters.name: SeverityFilter
parameters.query: SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL | distinct tostring(breach_category) | order by breach_category asc
parameters.label: Breach Category

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(Label:string, Value:long, Order:int)["Total Catalog Entries", 0, 1, "Distinct Breach Sources", 0, 2, "Active Breaches", 0, 3, "Breach Categories", 0, 4]),
(SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Total Catalog Entries", Order=1 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=dcount(catalog_id) | extend Label="Distinct Breach Sources", Order=2 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where breach_status == "active" | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Active Breaches", Order=3 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=dcount(breach_category) | extend Label="Breach Categories", Order=4 | project Label, Value=v, Order)
| summarize Value=max(Value) by Label, Order
| order by Order asc
content.title: Breach Catalog Overview

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(breach_category)
| summarize Count=count() by tostring(breach_category))
content.title: Breach Category Distribution

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(breach_title)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by catalog_id
| project BreachTitle=breach_title, Category=tostring(breach_category), Status=breach_status, Description=breach_description, CatalogID=catalog_id, TimeGenerated
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50)
content.title: Recent Breach Catalog Entries

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize NewBreaches=dcount(catalog_id) by bin(TimeGenerated, 7d)
| order by TimeGenerated asc)
content.title: New Breach Sources Over Time (Weekly)

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(breach_title)
| summarize RecordCount=count() by tostring(breach_title)
| order by RecordCount desc
| take 15)
content.title: Top 15 Breach Sources by Record Volume
